description: Record storing a Curvenote SCMS work version for AT Protocol publishing. Includes strong references to Standard.site publication and document records plus supporting content blobs.

main.description: Manifest for one work version. Uses Standard.site schemas for site (publication) and submission (document) versions, with references to published records and optional supporting blobs.

version.description: Work version identifier (e.g. WorkVersion.id or semantic version).

schemaVersion.description: Schema/lexicon version for interpreting this record (e.g. 1.0).

siteSchema.description: Standard.site schema identifier for the site version record.

site.description: Strong reference to a site.standard.publication record for this site version.

submissionSchema.description: Standard.site schema identifier for the submission version record.

submission.description: Strong reference to a site.standard.document record for this submission version.

createdAt.description: Client-declared time when this record was created.

contentItem.description: Path and blob ref for one content JSON file.

publicItem.description: Path and blob ref for one static public file.
